title: Contract Tests, Fault Injection, Deployment, Upgrade, and Recovery · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs contract tests, fault injection, deployment, upgrade, and recovery from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the tested, recoverable RabbitMQ production release. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for tested, recoverable RabbitMQ production release after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Test pure policy, envelope schema, topology routes, publisher confirms, consumer effects, disposable broker integration, and production probes at distinct layers.
Inject return, nack, close, heartbeat loss, blocked connection, duplicate, poison, dependency timeout, majority loss, restart, and stale callback failures deterministically.
Roll out schema, topology, publisher, consumer, policy, and broker changes in a compatibility-safe order with shadow evidence and rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Layered Test Strategy
steps.instruction:
Order the Layered Test Strategy RabbitMQ and TypeScript HTTP evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Layered Test Strategy.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Layered Test Strategy assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Layered Test Strategy, keep Layered Test Strategy connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A review messaging team handles case 1600 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on contracts, broker faults, compatible rollout, rollback, and supported upgrade path; show recovery after the changed failure is removed; then introduce a sequence gap for one partition while another stays healthy. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test pure policy, envelope schema, topology routes, publisher confirms, consumer effects, disposable broker integration, and production probes at distinct layers.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Layered Test Strategy has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
